title: selaginella macroblepharis
intro: Selaginella macroblepharis, also known as the Giant Cliff Fern or Giant Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, epiphytic fern that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella macroblepharis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Selaginella macroblepharis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in some parts of the world.
